payload.answer: I can help rewrite this memory, but “the other one” is ambiguous. Please choose how to repair it.
repair_options: Replace it with a specific preference, e.g. “He prefers [item A] over [item B].”
Rewrite it as a clearer but still partial note, e.g. “He prefers the other option in this context.”
Keep the current memory unchanged and add a clarifying memory about what “the other one” refers to.
If you meant to correct the preference, provide the exact new version to use instead.
